insert.if:
INSERT ALL
INTO budget_ledger_self_r_history (id, ledger_self_id, biz_type, related_id, creator, create_time, updater, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{item.id}, #{item.ledgerSelfId}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updater}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
